Title: Gokû ga dai sekkin! Furîza hôi mô o buchi yarube
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Frieza orders the Ginyu Force to capture Vegeta, take the dragon balls, and kill Gohan and Krillin; Guldo thinks about his dislike for Vegeta; Goku prepares as his ship is on its final approach for Namek; Vegeta, Krillin, and Goha...
